content.speakerText: Hey, I just got a new haircut—what do you think?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我刚剪了新发型，你觉得怎么样？

options.text: Wow, it looks awesome! Really suits you.
I don't know, I prefer your old one.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Wow, it looks awesome! Really suits you.' 是具体、真诚且符合社交礼仪的赞美。'It's fine.' 太冷淡，缺乏热情；'I prefer your old one.' 否定对方选择，不礼貌；'Did it cost a lot?' 转移话题，未回应赞美需求。

content.speakerText: Thanks! I was kinda nervous about it.

options.text: Don't be! You nailed it. Seriously.
Yeah, I thought it was too short.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Don't be! You nailed it. Seriously.' 直接安抚对方焦虑，强化正面反馈。其他选项要么批评（opt_3），要么回避情绪（opt_4），或责备对方（opt_1），都不符合鼓励性回应原则。

content.speakerText: I tried a new style today—what do you think?
content.speakerTextCn: 我今天试了新发型，你觉得怎么样？

options.text: You always look great, but this is especially stunning!
Did you go to the same salon as last time?
Hmm, maybe try something else next time.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You always look great, but this is especially stunning!' 不仅赞美当前发型，还结合了对对方一贯风格的认可，表达更丰富。'It's different.' 语义中性，缺乏鼓励；其他选项或转移话题或隐含批评，不符合赞美场景。
